reasoning: Rippling raised $450 million in Series G funding on May 9, 2025, alongside a $200 million tender offer, which directly aimed to provide liquidity while avoiding an IPO. CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that an IPO is "not imminent" and characterized Rippling as a company that does not want to go public yet. Given the recent substantial private funding, the launch of an alternative liquidity mechanism, explicit denials of IPO plans just weeks ago, and only a 5-week window remaining until the July 1, 2025 deadline, the probability of an IPO announcement is extremely low.
